conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I have three features to build this sprint: user notifications, export to CSV, and OAuth login.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: OAuth login is the most complex but also the most requested by customers.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: CSV export is trivial but nobody is really asking for it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'll do OAuth login first, then notifications, and leave CSV export for a future sprint.

query: In what order did the user decide to implement the three features?
